title: Moist Magnificent American Bread Casserole
description: A rich and light American dish featuring stale bread, perfect for a show-off dinner, this keto-friendly casserole is cooked to perfection in a terracotta dish and finished under the broiler.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, saute the diced ham over medium heat until lightly browned.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, heavy cream, salt, and black pepper.
Add the shredded cheddar cheese, chopped parsley, and cooked ham to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Add the melted butter and stale bread cubes to the bowl and stir until the bread is evenly coated.
Transfer the bread mixture to a terracotta dish and smooth the top.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 25 minutes.
Remove the casserole from the oven and increase the oven temperature to broil.
Broil the casserole for an additional 5 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
